name: Hot Pizza Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Red and green pepper strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cut French stick into 1-inch slices, cutting only three-quarters through the bread.
3. Spread pasta sauce on each side of the bread.
4. Tuck pepperoni and pepper strips into each cut.
5. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and mozzarella cheese.
6. Wrap filled bread in foil.
7. Bake for 15 minutes.
Makes 6 servings, cost $1.55 per serving
